Patch Set 1:

Just found that conf-sanity test 69 was not verified by autotest. It was skipped in review-zfs session and was not tested in review-ldiskfs session.

Patch Set 1: Code-Review+1

Test 69 is also marked as SLOW. So, we would need to use SLOW=yes to get this test to run.

parents.subject: LU-5606 tests: add version check codes to conf-sanity test 41c

commit.subject: LU-14 tests: improve conf-sanity.sh test_69
commit.message:
LU-14 tests: improve conf-sanity.sh test_69

Fix conf-sanity.sh test_69 to also find and remove files on OST0
with spaces in their names.

Test-Parameters: testlist=conf-sanity envdefinitions=SLOW=yes alwaysuploadlogs
Signed-off-by: Andreas Dilger <andreas.dilger@intel.com>
Change-Id: I086c869ea5b3ba6c1f83cc2b6ce2c866b03ebbe5
